Wei You ť≠ŹśĒł
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei You (ť≠ŹśĒł). Persuaded Liu Yu to tolerate Gongsun Zan. Upon his death, Liu Yu clashed with Zan and died. Wei You was affiliated with Liu Yu. Wei You lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
